vocab.meaning: mức giá cao/đắt đỏ (thường đi kèm với đồ hiệu)
vocab.example: Although designer sneakers carry a premium price tag, the comfort they provide is often incomparable.

vocab.meaning: lợi ích về chỉnh hình/nâng đỡ cấu trúc bàn chân
vocab.example: I opt for established sports brands primarily for their orthopedic benefits, which prevent foot fatigue during long walks.

vocab.meaning: uy tín/vị thế của thương hiệu
vocab.example: Some people buy luxury loafers solely for the brand prestige, whereas I focus more on the leather quality.
With the market flooded with counterfeit goods, I prefer buying directly from official stores to ensure authenticity.
High-end fashion houses usually offer shoes with more sophisticated aesthetics that align with my professional wardrobe.

vocab.meaning: độ bền và khả năng chịu đựng (ngoại lực)
vocab.example: I view expensive hiking boots as an investment in durability and resilience for my outdoor adventures.
Major athletic labels utilize state-of-the-art technology in their midsoles to maximize energy return for runners.

vocab.meaning: hợp thời trang/đi đầu xu hướng
vocab.example: Being fashion-forward isn't my main priority, but I do appreciate how famous brands set the trend for each season.
I find the prices of some limited-edition collaborations to be quite exorbitant and difficult to justify.

vocab.meaning: bền vững theo thời gian/không lỗi mốt
vocab.example: Classic designs from iconic shoe brands tend to stand the test of time, both in terms of style and physical wear.
